title: Why Fast-paced Mover Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP) Is a Great Choice for Value Investors
text: Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP) made it through our 'Fast-Paced Momentum at a Bargain' screen and could be a great choice for investors looking for stocks that have gained strong momentum recently but are still trading at reasonable prices.

title: Targa Resources Corp. Announces Quarterly Dividend and Timing of Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Webcast
text: HOUSTON, Oct. 13, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) ("Targa" or the "Company") announced its quarterly dividend on common shares with respect to the third quarter of 2022.

title: Midstream Weekly Recap: Midstream Screams Higher With Energy Equities And Commodities
text: This week saw energy equities trounce other stock sectors, with midstream gaining 3.9%. OPEC's production cut bolstered investor confidence that bullish oil fundamentals would be supported.

title: Top 5 Large-Cap Stocks Flying High YTD in Terrible 2022
text: We have narrowed our search to five large-cap stocks that have popped more than 20% year to date. These are: DINO, ENPH, LPLA, SWAV and TRGP.

title: 5 Stocks to Buy for October After a Dreadful September
text: We have narrowed our search to five U.S. corporates that have strong growth potential for the rest of 2022. These are: BLDR, BJ, DINO, CHK, TRGP.

title: New Strong Buy Stocks for October 4th
text: CHS, PUMP, TRGP, EC, and RWEOY have been added to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) List on October 4, 2022.
